name: Kanape Me Tyri Rokfor
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter in a bowl. Gradually add the Roquefort cheese and stir until smooth.
2. Trim the crusts from the bread and cut into desired shapes.
3. Spread each piece of bread (or cracker) with the cheese mixture.
4. Place a slice of pickle and a caper on top of each canape.
